title: Spring Stroll 2024
location: Forest Avenue corridor, Staten Island, NY
summary: The Forest Avenue BID organizes their Spring Stroll every year inviting community members to stroll along the corridor and visit local businesses.
body:
The Forest Avenue BID organizes their "Spring Stroll" every year inviting community members to stroll along our beautiful corridor and visit our local businesses.

This is a free event to attend and no sign up is required. Businesses will be selling their goods and services throughout the corridor with many festive spring creations!

If you are a merchant in the Forest Ave BID please contact us to express your interest in participating.
